title_cn: 空军称与美国的Cope Tiger演习将如期进行
desc_original: The Royal Thai Air Force has confirmed its major air exercise, Cope Tiger, with the United States and Singapore, will go ahead in Thailand this month as planned, but with heightened security because of the Mideast war.
summary_cn: 泰国皇家空军已确认，其与美国和新加坡的主要空中演习Cope Tiger将在本月于泰国如期进行。然而，由于中东战争的影响，演习将加强安全措施。

title_cn: 东南亚面临炎热天气，中东冲突限制能源供应
desc_original: Southeast Asia is set to see a warmer-than-usual early summer, potentially raising power demand for fuel and straining grids at a time when the Middle East conflict has tightened energy supplies in the region.
summary_cn: 东南亚将在初夏迎来比往年更高的气温，这可能会导致燃料需求增加，从而在能源供应由于中东冲突而紧张的时期给电网带来压力。

title_cn: 网络诈骗再度增加，投资欺诈最严重
desc_original: The number of online-scam complaints rose again over the past week, with investment fraud causing the most damage, according to police.
summary_cn: 警方表示，上周的网络诈骗投诉再次上升，投资欺诈造成的损失最为严重。许多受害者因虚假投资机会而蒙受巨大经济损失。警方呼吁公众提高警惕，谨防此类骗局，并建议遇到可疑情况时及时举报。此类案件的增加对公众的财务安全构成了重大威胁。

title_cn: 达府边境加油站禁止缅甸车辆加油，泰国车辆限额1000泰铢
desc_original: TAK — Gas stations in several border districts of Tak province have begun restricting fuel sales, banning vehicles from Myanmar while limiting Thai-registered cars to purchases of no more than 1,000 baht. Reporters in Mae Sot said the move follows a recent surge of vehicles crossing from the Myanmar border town of Myawaddy to queue for fuel at stations in the district, after unrest in the Middle East raised concerns over energy supplies. Some gas stations in five border districts — Mae Sot, Phop
summary_cn: 达府（TAK）—达府多个边境县的加油站开始限制燃油销售，禁止缅甸车辆加油，并限制泰国登记车辆每次加油不得超过1000泰铢。据美索的记者报道，此举是因为最近从缅甸边境城镇妙瓦底（Myawaddy）过境的车辆激增，这些车辆在中东动荡引发对能源供应的担忧后，排队在当地加油站加油。达府五个边境县的某些加油站已经实施了这些限制措施。

title_cn: 两名男子因在芭提雅入室盗窃奢侈手表被捕
desc_original: Two arrested after luxury watches stolen in Pattaya home break-in Legacy Two Thai men were arrested today, March 9, over a burglary at a home in Pattaya ’s Phra Tamnak area after a break-in reported on March 2, with luxury watches worth more than 6.4 million baht reported stolen. The suspects, identified as 26 year old Kritsaphong and 28 year old Nakarin, were taken into custody by Pattaya City Police. The pair were linked to a burglary at a luxury home in the Phra Tamnak area, where two intrude
summary_cn: 3月9日，两名泰国男子因在芭提雅Phra Tamnak地区的一次入室盗窃中被捕，此次盗窃事件发生在3月2日，失窃的奢侈手表价值超过640万泰铢。嫌疑人分别是26岁的Kritsaphong和28岁的Nakarin，他们被芭提雅市警方拘留。两人涉嫌在Phra Tamnak地区的一处豪宅进行此次盗窃，两名嫌疑犯与这起案子有关。

title_cn: 在泰国寻找适合步行的城市？这里有5个选择
desc_original: Looking for walkable cities in Thailand to move to? Here’s 5 Legacy Thailand’s reputation for traffic gridlock and motorbike chaos is well-earned in most places. But five cities buck that trend with pedestrian-friendly neighbourhoods where expats and retirees can walk to markets, healthcare, restaurants, and parks without needing a car or motorbike. Of course, these are just five of many walkable cities in Thailand. Each city in this list offers pedestrian-friendly neighbourhoods, qu
summary_cn: 虽然泰国以交通堵塞和摩托车混乱而闻名，但有五个城市打破了这一趋势，它们的社区适合步行，外籍人士和退休人员可以在无需汽车或摩托车的情况下，步行前往市场、医疗机构、餐馆和公园。此列表中的每个城市都提供适合步行的社区。

title_cn: 泰国股市因中东战争升级而下跌
desc_original: The Stock Exchange of Thailand dived on Monday amid the escalating war in the Middle East, as oil prices moved beyond US$100 a barrel.
summary_cn: 在中东战争升级的情况下，泰国股市周一大幅下跌，原因是油价突破每桶100美元。

title_cn: 摩托车车祸受害者被带到警察局而非医院后身亡
desc_original: Motorcycle crash victim dies after taken to police station instead of hospital Legacy A family is seeking accountability after a rescue team took a Thai woman to a police station instead of a hospital following a motorcycle crash in Bangkok, leaving her to die at the station in February last year. The case resurfaced after the family of Warissara approached the non-profit organisation Saimai Survive for assistance. The family said the motorcycle accident took place case near Soi Lat Phrao 48 on
summary_cn: 一名泰国女子在曼谷发生摩托车事故后，被救援队带到警察局而非医院，最终于去年2月死于警察局内。受害者家庭正在寻求问责，并已向非营利组织Saimai Survive求助。该事故发生在Soi Lat Phrao 48附近。

title_cn: 王毅称中国是地区和平的重要支柱
desc_original: BEIJING — China’s top diplomat Wang Yi said Beijing plays an important role in maintaining peace and stability in Asia, highlighting the country’s long-standing policy of fostering friendly relations with neighboring states. Speaking on 8 March, Wang said China places neighboring countries high on its diplomatic agenda. He referred to the principle of “amity, sincerity, mutual benefit and inclusiveness,” proposed by Chinese President Xi Jinping, as the foundation of China’s neighborhood diplomac
summary_cn: 北京——中国最高外交官王毅表示，北京在维护亚洲地区的和平与稳定方面发挥着重要作用，强调了国家长期以来与邻国建立友好关系的政策。在3月8日的讲话中，王毅指出中国将邻国置于其外交议程的优先位置。他提到了中国国家主席习近平提出的“亲诚惠容”原则，这是中国周边外交的基础。

title_cn: 泰国监管机构放宽撤离航班规则
desc_original: BANGKOK — 9 March 2026, Thailand’s civil aviation regulator has eased rules to allow additional evacuation flights amid conflict in the Middle East, prioritising humanitarian needs for passengers stranded abroad. Air Chief Marshal Manat Chavanaprayoon, director of the Civil Aviation Authority of Thailand (CAAT), said on Monday that under normal circumstances flight approvals must follow each country’s standard procedures. However, during war or emergencies, authorities often need greater flexibi
summary_cn: 曼谷——2026年3月9日，泰国民航监管机构为中东冲突期间的额外撤离航班放宽了规则，优先考虑被困海外乘客的人道主义需求。泰国民航局（CAAT）局长马纳特·查瓦纳普拉育空军上将周一表示，在正常情况下，航班批准必须遵循各国的标准程序。但在战争或紧急情况下，政府通常需要更大的灵活性。

title_cn: 62名泰国公民从伊朗安全抵达土耳其
desc_original: First group of 62 Thai nationals arrives safely in Turkey from Iran Legacy A group of 62 Thai nationals has crossed from Iran into Turkey as part of a Royal Thai Government evacuation effort linked to an ongoing conflict in the Middle East, with onward travel to Thailand planned over March 8 and today, March 9. Officials at the Kapıköy border checkpoint received the first group on the evening of March 7 at 6.40pm local time. The reception was coordinated with the Department of Consular Affairs a
summary_cn: 第一批由泰国政府组织撤离中东冲突地区的62名泰国公民，已于3月7日晚安全抵达土耳其Kapıköy边境检查站。该撤离行动是由泰国皇家政府组织，与泰国领事事务部进行协调。预计他们将于3月8日和9日陆续返回泰国。

title_cn: 人工智能时代如何改变我们
desc_original: When we talk about AI transformation, we often point to systems, strategy and structure. But the deeper shift is personal. The AI age is not only redesigning how companies operate. It is reshaping how individuals create value.
summary_cn: 当我们谈论人工智能转型时，通常会关注系统、战略和结构。然而，更深层次的转变是个人的。人工智能时代不仅重新设计了公司运营的方式，也在重塑个人创造价值的方式。随着人工智能的普及，个人在工作和生活中的角色及价值观念正在发生显著变化。这种变化影响到了各行各业，使得人们在创造、决策和交流的方式上形成新的形态。

title_cn: 手术病例在术后状况不一致的叙述下受到审查
desc_original: Surgery case under scrutiny after conflicting accounts over post-op condition Legacy A Thai plastic surgeon defended himself after the patient’s family complained that a man remained unconscious for four days and his condition worsened following nose and chin surgery on March 4. The complainant, 34 year old Jiraphat, contacted the non-profit organisation Saimai Survive, saying his older brother, 37 year old Ittiphat, is still in critical condition after undergoing surgery at a clinic. Jiraphat s
summary_cn: 一名泰国整形外科医生为自己辩护，因为病人的家属投诉称，一名男性在3月4日进行鼻子和下巴手术后昏迷了四天，并且他的状况变得更糟。投诉人34岁的吉拉帕特联系了非营利机构赛麦求生，称他的哥哥37岁的伊提帕特在诊所手术后仍处于危急状态。

title_cn: 孟菲斯梅火乐队将于2026年4月在曼谷演出
desc_original: American metalcore band Memphis May Fire will return to Thailand for a live concert in Bangkok next year, organisers have announced. The band is set to perform on April 20, 2026 at The Street Hall , located on the 5th floor of The Street Ratchada shopping complex. Led by vocalist Matty Mullins , Memphis May Fire is known for its energetic metalcore sound and powerful live performances. Fans can expect a setlist featuring some of the band’s most popular tracks, including “The Sinner,” “Vices,” “B
summary_cn: 美国金属核乐队孟菲斯梅火将于明年重返泰国进行现场演出。据主办方宣布，乐队计划于2026年4月20日在The Street Ratchada购物中心5楼的The Street Hall举行演唱会。由主唱Matty Mullins领衔的孟菲斯梅火以其充满活力的金属核音乐风格和强大的现场表演而闻名。歌迷们可以期待演出清单中包括乐队的一些热门曲目，如“The Sinner”和“Vices”。

title_cn: 泰国少年16岁以优异成绩获得学士学位
desc_original: BANGKOK — A Thai teenager has drawn attention after graduating with a bachelor’s degree with second-class honours at the age of 16 while also building an impressive career in figure skating. Srisupha Kesavapitak, known as “Beijing”, enrolled at Ramkhamhaeng University in 2020 at the age of 13 after passing the IGCSE equivalency exam. She studied in two faculties simultaneously: English in the Faculty of Humanities and Optometry. After three years of study, she completed her first bachelor’s degr
summary_cn: 曼谷 —— 泰国一名少年因在16岁时以二等荣誉毕业并获得学士学位而得到关注，同时他在花样滑冰领域也有出色的表现。这位名叫Srisupha Kesavapitak的少年，昵称“北京”，在13岁时通过了IGCSE同等考试，并于2020年入读蓝康恒大学。他同时在两所学院学习：一个是人文学科的英语专业，另一个是视光学。在经过三年学习后，他完成了第一个学士学位。

title_cn: CIB在巴吞他尼仓库中发现124,200只壁虎尸体
desc_original: CIB finds 124,200 gecko carcasses at Pathum Thani warehouse Legacy The Central Investigation Bureau (CIB) yesterday, March 8, searched a warehouse in Lam Luk Ka district, Pathum Thani , leading to the arrest of two suspects and the seizure of dried gecko carcasses and restricted wood. The CIB’s Natural Resources and Environmental Crime Suppression Division said investigators had developed information that the site was being used to hide wildlife carcasses and protected wood, with possible links
summary_cn: 中央调查局（CIB）于3月8日在巴吞他尼省叻武里卡县搜查一仓库，逮捕了两名嫌疑人，并查获了干壁虎尸体和受限制的木材。CIB的自然资源与环境犯罪抑制科表示，调查人员掌握了该地点被用于隐藏野生动物尸体和保护木材的信息，可能存在相关联络。

title_cn: 芭堤雅酒吧员工举报外国男子偷走收银台手机
desc_original: Pattaya bar worker reports foreign man steals mobile from cashier counter Legacy A foreign man was seen in a CCTV footage, stealing a mobile phone of a Thai worker at a bar in Pattaya at about 8pm yesterday, March 8. The victim feared that the images and personal information on the phone would be leaked and misused. The worker of Utopia bar in Soi Pattaya 6 filed a complaint with Mueang Pattaya Police Station and provided CCTV footage as evidence. The suspect’s nationality has not been confirmed
summary_cn: 一名外国男子被监控录像拍到在芭堤雅的一家酒吧偷走了一名泰国工作人员的手机，事件发生在昨天晚上8点左右。受害者担心手机上的图像和个人信息会被泄露和滥用。Utopia酒吧的员工已经在芭堤雅市警察局报了警，并提供了监控录像作为证据。目前尚未确认嫌疑人的国籍。

title_cn: 英国男子在便利店袭击泰国警察后被制服
desc_original: British man attacks Thai police in convenience store before being restrained Legacy A video circulating online showed a British man attacked a Thai police officer inside a convenience store, before the officer and store staff restrained him. The footage was posted by an X user, @JamesPGoddard90 , yesterday, March 8, with the caption, “British tourist attacks a Thai police officer in 7-Eleven and instantly regrets it. It’s behaviour like this that gives all Brits abroad a bad name.” In the video,
summary_cn: 一段网上流传的视频显示，一名英国男子在便利店内袭击了一名泰国警察，然后被该警察和商店员工制服。这段视频由用户@JamesPGoddard90于3月8日发布，并配以文字：“英国游客袭击7-Eleven内的泰国警察，瞬间后悔。这种行为让外国人整体形象受损。”

title_cn: Buri Ram一住宅起火，疑与充电宝爆炸有关
desc_original: Power bank suspected after fire rips through home in Buri Ram Legacy Fire tore through a two-storey home in Hin Khon subdistrict, Lam Plai Mat district, Buri Ram, yesterday, March 8, before firefighters could bring the blaze under control, with the suspected cause later linked to a power bank explosion . Fire engines from the local area were dispatched after the report of a house fire in the subdistrict. By the time firefighters arrived, the blaze had already spread through the half-concrete, ha
summary_cn: 在Buri Ram省的Hin Khon分区，一栋两层住宅在3月8日发生火灾。火灾在消防员赶到现场前迅速蔓延。当地的消防车被派往现场扑救火灾，怀疑起火原因与充电宝爆炸有关。

title_cn: 冲突笼罩泰国汽车出口前景
desc_original: The auto industry could record sluggish car exports this year following the outbreak of war in the Middle East, which also raises inflation concerns if the conflict is prolonged, says Surapong Paisitpatanapong, vice-chairman of the Federation of Thai Industries and spokesman for its Automotive Industry Club.
summary_cn: 泰国工业联合会副主席兼汽车工业俱乐部发言人苏拉蓬·派锡帕塔纳蓬表示，由于中东战争的爆发，今年汽车出口可能表现不佳。如果冲突持续，这也会引发通胀担忧。

title_cn: 提名者操纵香椰市场
desc_original: The government is stepping up measures to stabilise the fragrant coconut market after investigations uncovered foreign-backed businesses allegedly manipulating prices and harming farmers.
summary_cn: 政府正在加紧措施以稳定香椰市场，此前的调查发现有外资支持的企业涉嫌操纵价格，损害了农民的利益。政府介入旨在保护国内市场和农民经济利益，确保市场的公正和透明。随着香椰作为一种受欢迎的农产品需求增加，外资公司的不正当竞争手法引起了官方的高度关注。

title_cn: 曼谷男子因前妻拒绝与其发生关系而将其杀害
desc_original: Bangkok man kills ex-wife after she refuses to have sex with him Legacy A Thai man fatally stabbed his ex-wife at a rented room in Bangkok yesterday, March 8, after she refused to have sex with him. The suspect, 58 year old Samorn, contacted a friend, who is a police officer, to confess that he murdered his ex-wife, 49 year old Wanatda. Samorn also told the officer he planned to commit suicide , prompting police to send additional support to the location, a room in Phasi Charoen district. Armed
summary_cn: 2023年3月8日，一名58岁的泰国男子萨蒙在曼谷的一处出租房内因其49岁的前妻瓦娜达拒绝与其发生性关系而将其刺死。萨蒙随后联系了一位警察朋友承认了谋杀行为，并表示计划自杀。警方随即增派人员赶往位于帕西乍能区的事发地点进行处理。

title_cn: 落日节拍：芭提雅音乐节 2026 年在海滩上演绎一个月的旋律
desc_original: The Pattaya Music Festival 2026 is a free, month-long event taking place over four weekends in March at various locations, including Central Pattaya Beach and Jomtien Beach.
summary_cn: 2026 年芭提雅音乐节是一个为期一个月的免费活动，于三月份的四个周末在包括芭提雅中央海滩和中天海滩在内的多个地点举行。这个音乐节为游客和居民带来了丰富多彩的音乐体验，各种风格的表演将在这些风景如画的海滩上演。活动不仅吸引了当地居民，还吸引了来自世界各地的音乐爱好者，是一次不容错过的音乐盛宴。

title_cn: 人潮涌现，芭提雅海滩音乐节拉开帷幕
desc_original: PATTAYA, Thailand – The Pattaya Music Festival 2026 officially opened on March 6 at 7 p.m. at the Central Pattaya Beach stage, bringing music, entertainment, and tourism promotion to the city throughout March.
summary_cn: 芭提雅，泰国——2026年3月6日晚7点，芭提雅音乐节在中央芭提雅海滩舞台正式开幕，为这座城市在整个三月带来了音乐、娱乐和旅游推广活动。

title_cn: 宋干节泰国2026年：官方日期、本地秘闻及礼仪 - KKday 博客
desc_original: Private Airport to City Transfer : Suvarnabhumi (BKK)/Don Mueang ... ... The SIAM Songkran Music Festival 2026 is the premier way to experience the Songkran Festival 2026 in Bangkok.
summary_cn: 2026年的宋干节将在曼谷举办，SIAM 宋干音乐节是体验此次节日的最好方式。游客可以乘坐私人机场到城市的交通工具前往宋干节所在地，活动主要在曼谷进行。

title_cn: 芭堤雅音乐节2026年3月每周末盛大开启
desc_original: – Week 4: March 27–28, 2026 — Lan Pho Public Park, Naklua (green open space in the Naklua area). The festival will feature a mix of popular Thai pop, rock, hip-hop, and other genres to suit different tastes.
summary_cn: 第4周：2026年3月27日至28日——兰坡公园，纳库鲁（纳库鲁地区的绿色开放空间）。此次音乐节将呈现多元化的音乐风格，包括流行的泰国流行音乐、摇滚、嘻哈等，以迎合不同人群的喜好。

title_cn: 2026年泰国将举办最大的音乐盛事 - 明日世界音乐节将在芭提雅历史性首秀，震撼亚洲音乐节舞台！
desc_original: The highly anticipated Tomorrowland Thailand will make its debut in Pattaya, Thailand, from 11–13 December 2026, marking the first-ever full-scale Asian edition of the iconic Belgian electronic music festival.
summary_cn: 备受期待的明日世界音乐节泰国站将于2026年12月11日至13日在泰国芭提雅首次亮相，这是标志性比利时电子音乐节首次在亚洲以全规模呈现。此次活动预计会吸引大批音乐爱好者，为亚洲的音乐节场景注入新活力，并进一步提升泰国作为国际旅游目的地的地位。这一全球闻名的音乐节将汇集全球顶尖DJ和簇拥，为观众带来一场视听盛宴。

title_cn: 宋干节 2026 泰国：官方日期、本地秘诀与礼仪 - KKday 博客
desc_original: Songkran Thailand 2026 is officially happening from Monday, April 13 to Wednesday, April 15, kicking off the traditional Thai New Year. While the official holiday is just three days, don’t be surprised if the water fights start early or go ...
summary_cn: 2026 年泰国宋干节将于 4 月 13 日星期一至 4 月 15 日星期三正式举行，开启传统的泰国新年。虽然官方假期只有三天，但如果泼水活动提前开始或继续进行，请不要感到惊讶。本节日不仅是泼水狂欢，还是体验泰国文化传统的良好机会。本文将分享玩水技巧、当地习俗和一些不为人知的小秘密，为您提前准备好迎接这场水的盛宴。
source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel

title_cn: 2026年泰国宋干节：泰国新年指南
desc_original: Officially, Songkran runs from April 13–15 every year. April 13 is the key day, when the main rituals happen and the water fights begin. In major cities like Bangkok and Chiang Mai, water fights usually last throughout all three days.
summary_cn: 宋干节正式的日期为每年的4月13日至15日。4月13日是最重要的一天，这一天主要仪式举行，泼水大战也从这天开始。在曼谷和清迈等大城市，泼水大战通常会持续整个三天。
source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel

title_cn: 宋干节——泰国欢快的新年泼水节
desc_original: Modern Songkran is a striking contrast of calm and chaos. ... • Large-scale water fights • DJ stages and live music • Foam parties and parades • Street-wide celebrations · In places like Bangkok, Songkran now resembles a massive open-air festival, with designated celebration zones, sponsored events, and organized safety measures.
summary_cn: 现代宋干节展示了一种宁静与混乱的鲜明对比。在曼谷等地，它如今就像一个大型的露天节日，有专门的庆祝区域、赞助的活动以及有组织的安全措施。宋干节的庆祝活动包括大规模的泼水大战、DJ舞台和现场音乐、泡沫派对和游行，以及整条街道的庆典。
source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel

title_cn: 宋干节2026：庆祝泰国传统新年！
desc_original: Enjoy unforgettable Songkran water festival experiences in Thailand from 13–15 April 2026.
summary_cn: 宋干节是泰国传统的新年庆祝活动，将于2026年4月13日至15日期间举行。游客可以在泰国各地体验难忘的泼水节，这一活动象征着清除过去的负面能量和迎接新一年的好运。在此期间，泰国的大街小巷将会充满欢笑与水花，传统的习俗活动和现代娱乐活动交织在一起，让游客可以充分体验这个重要的节日。
source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel

title_cn: 2026年SIAM泼水节音乐节：Martin Garrix、Marshmello及门票指南
desc_original: Save 5% on your first KKday app booking with code BLOG5OFF. Download the KKday app here! ... Songkran Thailand 2026 is officially happening from Monday, April 13 to Wednesday, April 15, kicking…
summary_cn: 2026年泰国泼水节（Songkran）将于4月13日（周一）至4月15日（周三）正式举行。著名DJ Martin Garrix和Marshmello将参加此次盛大的音乐节活动。游客可以通过使用折扣码BLOG5OFF在KKday应用上预订门票，首次预订可享受5%的优惠。赶紧下载KKday应用，计划您的音乐节之旅吧！
source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel

title_cn: 曼谷的胡里–宋干节盛会将两大节日融合在一起
desc_original: Bangkok is set to burst with color and celebration as the Holi–Songkran Fiesta 2026 takes place on Sunday, 8 March 2026, at the ITCC in Bangkok, bringing together two of Asia’s most joyful cultural traditions in one lively event.
summary_cn: 曼谷将在2026年3月8日星期日于曼谷ITCC举办胡里–宋干节盛会，这场盛会将在一个活力四射的活动中融合亚洲两大欢乐的文化传统。届时，曼谷将充满色彩和庆祝活动，使这一天充满欢快的节日气氛。
source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel

title_cn: 泰国超越中国、日本、韩国、台湾等多个国家，成为2026年宋干节的首选目的地，推动全球旅行和文化庆典的空前增长
desc_original: Pattaya leads the list of domestic destinations, primarily due to its extended celebrations. The city’s festival continues well beyond the traditional Songkran dates, lasting until April 19.
summary_cn: 芭提雅在国内目的地中领先，主要由于其延长的庆祝活动。这座城市的节日庆祝持续时间远远超出传统的宋干节日期，一直持续到4月19日。2026年的宋干节见证了泰国成为首选目的地，吸引了全球游客关注，推动了文化和旅游的迅速发展。
source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel

title_cn: 曼谷艺术文化中心举办“三城艺术”展览，重新诠释多罗发底美学，促进泰国文化旅游增长
desc_original: From 3 to 8 March 2026, the “Three Cities of Art” exhibition will be held at the Bangkok Art and Culture Centre (BACC) in a highly transformative exhibition of Dvaravati aesthetics in the context of modern art.
summary_cn: 2026年3月3日至8日，“三城艺术”展览将在曼谷艺术文化中心（BACC）举行。本次展览将多罗发底文化的古代美学与现代艺术相结合，极具变革性，旨在通过艺术重新解读泰国的文化遗产，进一步推动文化旅游业的发展。这不仅为当地艺术家提供了一个展示平台，也吸引了广泛的国际关注，为泰国文化旅游注入新活力。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title_cn: 天堂艺术馆芭提雅2026 - 门票价格、开放时间及照片
desc_original: Explore Art in Paradise Pattaya, Thailand’s famous 3D art museum. Check latest ticket prices, opening hours, photos, location, and book with instant confirmation.
summary_cn: 探索天堂艺术馆（Art in Paradise）芭提雅，泰国著名的3D艺术博物馆。查看最新门票价格、开放时间、照片、位置，并可即时确认预订。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title_cn: 宋干节泰国2026：官方日期、本地秘密和礼仪 - KKday博客
desc_original: Private Airport to City Transfer : Suvarnabhumi (BKK)/Don Mueang ... ... The SIAM Songkran Music Festival 2026 is the premier way to experience the Songkran Festival 2026 in Bangkok.
summary_cn: 文章介绍了2026年泰国宋干节的官方日期、在曼谷庆祝该节日的一些本地秘密和社交礼仪。特别提到了SIAM宋干音乐节2026，这是一种体验曼谷宋干节的顶级方式。此外，还提及了从机场到市区的私人接送服务（素万那普机场BKK/廊曼机场）。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title_cn: 三月曼谷艺术展览
desc_original: This edition frames culture as an archive you carry in your body. It lives in music, photographs, half-remembered conversations and objects kept for reasons you cannot quite explain.
summary_cn: 这一期的艺术展览将文化视为你身体内携带的档案。它存在于音乐、照片、半记住的对话和你无法完全解释原因而保存的物品中。这些展览通过各种艺术形式展示了历史和个人记忆的交织，以及它们是如何影响当下的。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title_cn: 日落节拍：2026年芭提雅音乐节在海滩上演绎音乐月
desc_original: The Pattaya Music Festival 2026 is a free, month-long event taking place over four weekends in March at various locations, including Central Pattaya Beach and Jomtien Beach.
summary_cn: 2026年芭提雅音乐节是一项免费活动，持续一个月，于三月的四个周末在多个地点举行，包括中央芭提雅海滩和中天海滩。此次音乐节为游客和当地居民提供了丰富的音乐体验，将各类音乐表演带到充满活力的海滩场所。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title_cn: 我们的亚洲冒险 2026：曼谷 - 相信我，让私人导游帮您处理（美好的）混乱
desc_original: Day 1 was what they call the “Must See Itinerary” for an introduction to Thailand ‘s architecture, culture, and tradition. (An important fact to know about Thailand is that 90% of the population has some degree of adherence to the Buddhist teachings.
summary_cn: 第一天是所谓的“必看行程”，用于介绍泰国的建筑、文化和传统。需要注意的是，泰国有90%的人口在某种程度上信奉佛教。这次旅游行程中，我们首先参观了曼谷的著名寺庙，欣赏了庄严的建筑艺术。我们还体验了当地的传统活动，并了解了泰国文化的独特魅力。私人导游的陪同让我们更加深入地感受到了曼谷的风情。
source: Bangkok Pattaya art exhibition museum cu

title_cn: 泰国宋干节 2026：官方日期、本地秘密与礼仪
desc_original: Bangkok BTS Skytrain One-Day Pass(Buy SIM Card to get special ... ... In Chiang Mai, the party is centred around the Old City Wall and moat. Things get really wild at Thapae Gate (East Gate) and Chang Puek Gate (North Gate). These spots are packed with water fights and lots of splashy chaos. Another spot you can’t escape soaking is the plaza at Central Festival Mall. Step out after shopping, and boom!
summary_cn: 在曼谷，搭乘BTS空铁一日通票的游客可获得特价优惠。在清迈，派对围绕在古城墙和护城河附近。Thapae门（东门）和Chang Puek门（北门）是水仗和热闹场面的集中地。中央购物中心广场也是一个无法避免被泼水的地方。购物后走出，准备迎接一场水仗吧！
source: Thailand shopping festival fair expo Ban

title_cn: 曼谷设计周 2026 成为亚洲创意中心
desc_original: Representing the Philippines, Bangkok Design Week 2026 serves as the launch platform for "LAHI (Heritage): The Philippines Fashion Exhibition," presented through a collaboration between the Department of Trade and Industry (DTI), the Philippine ...

title_cn: 曼谷设计周2026年成为亚洲创意中心
desc_original: Representing the Philippines, Bangkok Design Week 2026 serves as the launch platform for “LAHI (Heritage): The Philippines Fashion Exhibition,“ presented through a collaboration between the Department of Trade and Industry (DTI), the Philippine ...

title_cn: 泰国发布2026年全球创新MICE总体规划
desc_original: Riding on the strong momentum of previous successful editions, TEA is gearing up to host the Thailand MICE X-Change 2026 (TMX 2026) this coming April at the Queen Sirikit National Convention Center (QSNCC).
summary_cn: 泰国会展局（TEA）凭借先前成功举办活动的强劲势头，正准备于明年四月在诗丽吉王后国家会议中心（QSNCC）举办泰国MICE交换会2026（TMX 2026）。此活动意在通过推广创新领域的机会，进一步加强泰国作为全球会展目的地的地位。
source: Thailand shopping festival fair expo Ban
